title: Walnut Trestle Dining Table
description: solid walnut trestle base. want to build something like this for the house. #woodworking #diningtable
alt_text: A dark walnut trestle dining table with breadboard ends on a wood floor

title: Live Edge Coffee Table with Steel Legs
description: live edge slab with hairpin steel legs. good weekend project once i find the right slab. #liveedge
alt_text: Live edge wood coffee table with black hairpin legs in a living room

title: Farmhouse Table Apron Joinery
description: clean apron to leg joinery on this farmhouse table. saving for the joint detail. #farmhousetable
alt_text: Underside of a farmhouse table showing mortised apron and leg joints

title: Small Oak Side Table
description: simple tapered leg oak side table. quick build to practice tapers. #oak #sidetable
alt_text: A small oak side table with four tapered legs

title: Entryway Storage Bench
description: entry bench with shoe cubbies underneath. would work by the back door. #storagebench
alt_text: Wooden entryway bench with open cubbies for shoes below the seat

title: Shaker Style Hall Bench
description: clean shaker lines on this hall bench. like the peg rail above it too. #shaker
alt_text: A shaker style hall bench with a peg rail mounted on the wall above

title: Timber Frame Garden Bench
description: chunky timber garden bench. mortise and tenon everything. #outdoorfurniture
alt_text: A heavy timber garden bench with visible joinery outdoors

title: Wall Hung Shaker Cabinet
description: small wall hung cabinet with a frame and panel door. good practice piece. #cabinetmaking
alt_text: A small wall hung wooden cabinet with a single frame and panel door

title: Bookcase with Adjustable Shelves
description: solid wood bookcase with shelf pin holes. want this for the living room. #bookcase
alt_text: A tall solid wood bookcase with adjustable shelves against a wall

title: Hand Cut Through Dovetails
description: clean through dovetails cut by hand. want mine to look this tight. #dovetails #handtools
alt_text: Close up of tight hand cut through dovetail joint on a drawer corner

title: Half Blind Dovetail Layout
description: layout marks for half blind dovetails on a drawer front. saving the marking method. #joinery
alt_text: A drawer front marked out with pencil lines for half blind dovetails

title: Dovetail Saw and Marking Gauge
description: dovetail saw and wheel gauge setup. thinking about the lie-nielsen saw. #handtools
alt_text: A dovetail saw and marking gauge laid on a workbench

title: Sawing to the Line Technique
description: good angle to hold the saw when cutting tails. need to practice this more. #woodworking
alt_text: A hand sawing dovetails on a board held in a vise

title: Chopping Mortises by Hand
description: chopping a clean mortise with a chisel and mallet. save for the technique. #mortiseandtenon
alt_text: A chisel chopping a mortise in a piece of oak on a bench

title: Drawbore Tenon Joint
description: drawbored mortise and tenon pulls tight without clamps. want to try this on the next table. #joinery
alt_text: A cutaway showing a drawbore peg pulling a tenon into a mortise

title: Tenon Shoulder Fit
description: tight tenon shoulders make the whole joint. reference photo. #woodworking #handtools
alt_text: Close up of a tenon seated with clean tight shoulders against a rail

title: One Car Garage Shop Layout
description: smart layout for a one car garage shop. mobile bases so everything rolls. #workshop
alt_text: A garage woodworking shop layout with a workbench and tools on mobile bases

title: Workbench Under the Window
description: bench under the window for natural light. want mine set up like this. #workbench
alt_text: A wooden workbench positioned under a shop window with hand tools above

title: Roubo Bench Build
description: solid roubo bench with a leg vise. dream bench honestly. #roubo #workbench
alt_text: A heavy Roubo style workbench with a leg vise and holdfasts

title: Small Shop Dust Collection Runs
description: ductwork layout for a small shop dust collector. saving for when i get the collector. #dustcollection
alt_text: Diagram of dust collection ductwork running along a garage shop ceiling

title: Cyclone Dust Separator Setup
description: cyclone separator on a bucket keeps the bags clean. cheap upgrade. #shopsetup
alt_text: A cyclone dust separator mounted on a sealed bucket next to a shop vac

title: Hand Tool Wall Cabinet
description: wall cabinet with chisels and layout tools laid out clean. want to build one over the bench. #toolstorage
alt_text: An open hand tool wall cabinet with chisels saws and squares organized inside

title: Rolling Tool Chest Build
description: shop built rolling tool chest with drawers. good storage project. #toolchest
alt_text: A shop built rolling tool chest with several drawers open showing tools

title: Wall Mounted Lumber Rack
description: french cleat lumber rack keeps boards off the floor. building this first. #lumberstorage
alt_text: A wall mounted lumber rack holding boards on cantilevered arms
